findings.comment: The worktree-visible evidence table says orchestrator-reviewer-integrity.Tests.ps1 passed 7 tests and explicitly claims its counts are runner-reported, but the digest-matched .review/implementer-evidence.json for this exact reviewed tree records 8 passed. The state also claims the earlier prose-only 7/7 problem was fixed by making this table a companion to the injected record. This stale count falsifies that process/evidence claim. Regenerate or update the visible coverage row from the digest-linked record (including its recorded duration/command) and keep state claims consistent; no visible human deferral covers the mismatch.

findings.design_reference: T020 / FR-018 / FR-019 / SC-007 / NFR-007; Verification confidence lens
findings.comment: T020 is marked done and explicitly requires paired tests proving the missing-input preflight and post-invocation accounting paths, but the digest-matched implementer evidence records only bounded-verification.Tests.ps1 and orchestrator-reviewer-integrity.Tests.ps1. The relevant changed suite tests/continuous-co-review/unit/review-spend-allowance.Tests.ps1 is not recorded. The pass claim in iterations/003/coverage-evidence.md is hand-written and has zero evidence standing under the review contract. Record a digest-matched execution of the T020 suite (including the preflight and failed-invocation cases), or leave T020 incomplete; current done/tested progress is not supportable.
